title: Sonnet 5 is LIVE And It Competes With Opus
summary: Claude Sonnet 5 is a newly released language model that achieves benchmarks approaching Claude Opus 4.8 performance. A review examines whether Sonnet 5's benchmark improvements translate to real-world task performance gains over the previous Sonnet version.
writeup: The video covers Claude Sonnet 5, a newly released language model whose benchmarks approach Claude Opus 4.8 performance. Chase AI reviews the model to test whether those benchmark gains carry over to real-world task performance compared with the previous Sonnet version. The central question is model evaluation: whether reported scores reflect practical improvements rather than benchmark movement alone.
